description: College Football Fantasy Scoring — run Monte Carlo sims before locking
notes: Points calibrated so T1 pick isn't auto-win and T4 upsets matter. Adjust after sim testing.

upset_bonus.description: Fires when your team wins and was 10+ spots lower in AP poll, or unranked beating ranked

weekly_bonuses.description: Owner whose portfolio earned the most points that week gets a bonus

draft_structure.description: Default draft tiers — override per league in league config
draft_structure.notes: pool_size = how many teams are available in each tier. Set after strength ratings are pulled. Snake draft order.
